---
name: Security concern
about: Report a suspected security or privacy problem (read the warning first)
title: "[Security] "
labels: ["security", "needs-triage"]
---

<!--
STOP: A suspected security or privacy INCIDENT (e.g. you can see another
account's data, a leaked secret, or data corruption) is a P0. Do NOT post
sensitive details in a public issue.

- Never include passwords, tokens, invitation codes, the coach registration code,
  session data, or private health information.
- A dedicated private reporting route still needs to be established for this
  project. Until it exists, contact a maintainer privately out of band and keep
  this issue high-level.

See docs/security.md and docs/testing/feedback-triage.md.
-->

**Is this an active incident (possible unauthorized access, leak, or data
corruption)?** <!-- yes / no -->

**High-level summary (no sensitive details):**

**Affected area (page/flow/endpoint), described generally:**

**Account type:** <!-- public demo / private test -->

**Suggested severity:** <!-- P0 for incidents; otherwise P1/P2 -->

**Have you contacted a maintainer privately?** <!-- yes / no -->
